title: Warm up
content: Images showcasing different driving experiences in three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: A visual representation of Chinese taxi services and various cityscapes, highlighting the dynamic progress within the nation.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: Focuses on investigating local features and development strategies to achieve positive outcomes in various cities.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Assigns specific development strategies to different cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: Explores the development strategies of cities through the perspectives of taxi drivers, emphasizing the adaptation of strategies to local features for development.
